hero.desktopSuffix: With expertise in secure development, cybersecurity, business analysis, and project management, we deliver solutions that drive lasting results.

slides.headline: Yorkshire Global Consulting Inc.
slides.description: We help organizations strengthen their systems, streamline operations, and execute projects with confidence.

slides.headline: Security-first delivery
slides.description: From secure development practices to governance and compliance support, we reduce risk and improve outcomes.

slides.headline: Clear analysis. Reliable execution.
slides.description: Business analysis and project management that aligns stakeholders and delivers measurable value.

who.headingSubtitle: Yorkshire Global Consulting Inc. is a professional services firm based in Ontario, Canada. We support organizations across industries by improving how they build software, manage risks, analyze business needs, and deliver complex projects. Our work is grounded in practical experience, proven methods, and a commitment to client success.

cards.title: Practical experience
cards.text: Grounded in real-world delivery, with structured methods that scale across teams.

cards.title: Proven methods
cards.text: Security, analysis, governance, and delivery practices aligned to outcomes.

cards.title: Client success
cards.text: Clear communication and accountability—so projects move forward with confidence.

modernIT.title: Modern IT Support & Secure AI Solutions
modernIT.intro: Cut operational costs and accelerate innovation with flexible IT support and secure AI development services. Yorkshire Global Consulting helps organizations modernize operations without the overhead of maintaining large internal teams.

col1.title: Get IT Support — Count on Us
col1.desc: Reduce the cost and complexity of maintaining an internal IT team. Our managed IT support services provide experienced professionals who monitor, maintain, and support your systems so your organization can focus on delivering value.
points: Flexible support without full-time hiring costs

col2.title: Build Your AI Agent — Securely
col2.desc: Design and deploy intelligent AI agents without compromising security or compliance. We help organizations build reliable AI solutions with strong governance, cybersecurity controls, and scalable architecture.

solutions.title: Technology Solutions That Drive Business Performance
solutions.subtitle: We help organizations modernize operations, secure infrastructure, and implement intelligent technologies that create measurable business value.

items.title: Cybersecurity & Digital Resilience
items.desc: Protect critical systems and data with enterprise-grade cybersecurity strategy, risk assessments, and operational resilience planning.

items.title: AI & Intelligent Automation
items.desc: Implement AI-powered systems and intelligent automation to improve operational efficiency and support data-driven decision making.

items.title: Digital & Technology Transformation
items.desc: Modernize legacy systems and align technology with business strategy so that technology investments deliver measurable business outcomes.

trust.title: Why Organizations Choose Yorkshire Global Consulting

steps.title: Assessment
steps.desc: We analyze systems, risks, and opportunities.

steps.title: Strategy & Implementation
steps.desc: We design and deploy secure, scalable solutions.

services.headingSubtitle: A preview of what we deliver.

items.title: Managed IT Support
items.detail: Cost-effective IT operations support designed to reduce the burden of maintaining an internal IT team. We provide monitoring, maintenance, troubleshooting, and security-focused support to keep systems running efficiently.

items.title: Secure AI Agent Development
items.detail: Design and deployment of AI agents with security, governance, and reliability built in. We help organizations implement AI solutions safely while protecting data, infrastructure, and compliance requirements.

items.title: SSDLC
items.detail: We help organizations integrate security into every stage of software development: secure coding practices, threat modeling, code reviews, DevSecOps integration, secure architecture guidance, and full SSDLc program setup.

items.title: Cybersecurity Services
items.detail: Risk and vulnerability assessments, security policy development, cloud and infrastructure security review, governance and compliance support, incident readiness planning, and security awareness training.

items.title: Business Analysis
items.detail: Requirements gathering, workflow analysis, gap assessments, process improvement, documentation (BRDs/FRDs, use cases, user stories), and stakeholder management.

items.title: Project Management
items.detail: Full lifecycle management, PMO setup, Agile/Waterfall/Hybrid delivery, scheduling and resource planning, risk and issue management, vendor coordination, and project recovery.

items.title: Business & Strategy Consulting
items.detail: Strategic planning, operational improvement, digital transformation guidance, change management, business continuity planning, and performance measurement frameworks.

industries.cardSubtitle: Tailored support for security, clarity, and delivery.
